description_long: This playground is set within a rectangular grassy lot, featuring a circular arrangement of small playhouses or huts surrounded by trees and shrubbery. A paved path leads from the entrance to a larger building at the rear, which appears to serve as a community or activity center. The play area is defined by a ring of structures, possibly for imaginative play, and is interspersed with trees that provide natural shade. The grounds are landscaped with a mix of coniferous and deciduous trees, and the perimeter is bordered by grass. The main building has a gabled roof and is accompanied by a smaller annex or utility shed. The overall layout is organized and inviting, with clear separation between the play zone and the building area.
description: A landscaped playground with a circular cluster of small playhouses, trees, and a main building at the back, all set on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular playhouse arrangement, central tree, and the main building at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the linear layout, with the play area on the left and the main building and annex on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the main building, annex, and the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main building on the left and the play area on the right, with visible pathways and landscaping.
